    Maven Subscription Service: Terms and Conditions

    Last Updated: February 3, 2026
    Please read these Terms and Conditions ("Terms") carefully before subscribing to the Maven service (the "Service") operated by Maven ("Maven," "we," "us," or "our"). By subscribing to the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

    1. Subscription and Renewal

    Agreement: These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you, the customer ("you" or "Subscriber"), and Maven governing your subscription to the Service.
    Automatic Renewal: Your subscription is billed in advance on a recurring basis and will automatically renew until cancelled. By subscribing, you authorize Maven to charge your designated payment method for the recurring subscription fees.
    Payment Failure: If renewal payment fails, your access to the Service and eligibility for all benefits will be immediately paused or terminated until a successful payment is received.

    Overview

    This is an AI-animated video featuring your adorable baby dancing with toilet paper rolls! The video includes fun motion effects and upbeat music to create an entertaining and shareable moment.

    Video Details

    File: baby_dancing_with_music.mp4
    Specifications:
    • Duration: 10 seconds
    • Resolution: 720x1280 (9:16 portrait format)
    • Frame Rate: 30 fps
    • File Size: ~3.1 MB
    • Format: MP4 (H.264 video, AAC audio)

    Animation Effects

    The video features multiple dancing effects applied to the baby image:
    1. Bouncing Motion: The baby bounces up and down rhythmically
    2. Swaying Movement: Side-to-side swaying motion
    3. Zoom Effect: Gentle zoom in and out for dynamic energy
    4. Rotation: Subtle rotation back and forth
    5. Light Pink Background: Soft, playful background color
    All effects are synchronized to create a natural dancing motion!

    Quick Start Guide - Dancing Baby Video

    Quick Start Guide - Dancing Baby Video

    🎯 Your Mission

    Create an AI video of your baby dancing with toilet paper and add fun music!

    ⚡ Fast Track (5 Minutes)

    Step 1: Generate Video (2-3 minutes)

    1. Go to https://pika.art and sign in
    2. Upload baby.jpeg (included )
    3. Paste this prompt:
      Plain Text
      A joyful toddler with blonde hair wearing a polka dot pajama top is energetically dancing and bouncing while holding rolls of white toilet paper in both hands, waving them around playfully like pom-poms. The baby is moving rhythmically with happy expressions, swaying side to side, bouncing up and down, and twirling the toilet paper rolls. The toilet paper unrolls slightly creating flowing white streamers. Warm natural lighting in a cozy bathroom.
    4. Set Motion: High | Duration: 3-5 sec | Aspect: 9:16
    5. Click Generate and wait

    2. Upload your Pika video
    3. Add music (see recomme

    New Website Copy for Maven

    New Website Copy for Maven

    Page Title: Maven | Real Help for When Life Gets Expensive

    Section 1: Hero - You Are Seen

    (Headline - Large, bold, centered)

    It’s expensive to be poor.

    (Sub-headline - Smaller, empathetic)
    That feeling in the grocery line, deciding what to put back. The car making a noise you can’t afford to fix. The $30 field trip fee that feels like a mountain. We see you. We’ve been you.
    This isn’t a handout. This isn’t a loan. This is a community that refuses to let you struggle alone.
    (Primary CTA - Bright, prominent button)
    [ I'm In. Show Me How. ]

    Section 2: Our DNA - What Makes Us Mavens

    (Headline)

    We’re Not a Corporation. We’re a Community.

    Maven DNA is the belief that knowledge is only valuable when it’s used to lift someone else up. It’s the unique fusion of High-Level Expertise and Radical Empathy. It’s what we wished existed when we were in your shoes. This is
    maven-implementation-guide.md

    Maven Website Implementation Guide

    Purpose of This Document

    This guide provides step-by-step instructions for implementing the redesigned Maven website in Wix. It includes the new copy, design specifications, technical requirements, and a checklist to ensure the final website is aligned with Maven DNA and speaks directly to Ruby Red.

    Pre-Implementation: Spirit Check

    Before you begin building, review these alignment questions:

    Does the website...

    • Speak directly TO Ruby Red (not ABOUT her)?
    • Lead with empathy before features?
    • Show all 4 Strands of Maven DNA clearly?
    • Use Maven Language (Chaos Support, Lean on Me Ledger, The Rally, Grace, etc.)?
    • Feel human, scrappy, and real (not corporate or polished)?
    • Make Ruby Red feel seen in the first 5 seconds?
    If any answer is "no," revisit the content strategy document before proceeding.

    Implementation Roadmap

    Phase 1: Content Migration (Week 1)

    1. Set up new Wix page structure
    Maven Website Redesign: Executive Summary

    Maven Website Redesign: Executive Summary

    The Problem

    The current Maven website uses corporate language, buries the emotional connection, and doesn't clearly communicate the 4 Strands of Maven DNA. Ruby Red—the 35-45 year old mom in the grocery line deciding what to put back—doesn't immediately see herself or feel seen.

    The Solution

    A complete website redesign that is human-first, no fluff, and aligned with Maven DNA. The new website speaks directly TO Ruby Red, not ABOUT her. It leads with empathy, shows vulnerability, and makes the reciprocal nature of Maven immediately clear.

    Key Changes

    Voice & Tone Transformation

    Old Voice
    New Voice
    "Maven isn't a bank or a handout; it's a subscription made by people who've been there."
    "We've been in that grocery line. We've felt that weight. Maven is what we wished existed when we needed it."
    Corporate, transactional
    Human, reciprocal
    Talks ABOUT people in crisis
    Talks TO Ruby R

    YouTube News Channel Analysis & Recommendations

    Executive Summary

    This YouTube channel represents YouTube's official News aggregation hub, curating breaking news and top stories from major Canadian and international news organizations.     Channel Name: News
    Channel URL: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYfdidRxbB8Qhf0Nx7ioOYw
    Channel Type: Official YouTube News Aggregator
    Primary Focus: Canadian news with international coverage

    Content Organization

    The channel organizes news into nine distinct categories, allowing viewers to navigate by topic area:
    Category
    Description
    Top stories
    Breaking news and most significant current events
    Sports
    Athletic events, teams, and sports-related news
    Entertainment
    Celebrity news, med

    Maven + Cashco Guardian Insights Hub
    Maven Cashco Guardian: Wisdom Giants Dictionary & Empathy Hinge

    Maven Cashco Guardian: Wisdom Giants Dictionary & Empathy Hinge

    Version: January 29, 2026
    Purpose: Portable reference document for cross-chat consistency
    Maintained by: SIC Solve Team

    How to Use This Document

    Upload this document at the start of any new chat session to ensure the AI assistant understands the Maven Cashco Guardian's philosophy, protocols, and character. This is a living document that should be updated as new wisdom is collected.

    Part I: The North Star — Who We Are

    The Core Philosophy

    "There, for the grace of God, go I."
    This is not just a phrase—it is the lens through which every interaction must be viewed. The Maven Cashco Guardian exists to serve people who are navigating the three "gangster worlds" that weaponize fear against the financially vulnerable:
    1. The Political World — Systems that create barriers rather than bridges
    2. The Bureaucratic World — Processes designed for institutions, not humans
    Empathy Wisdom Brain

    Empathy Wisdom Brain

    This document captures the emotional intelligence, empathy insights, and communication wisdom that will power the Maven + Cashco Guardian's ability to truly understand and support clients.

    Core Philosophy: Trust Over Credit

    "The richness is in trust. And that's exactly how I see Maven. We don't judge, we trust and with trust, we flourish!" — Samantha M.

    Samantha's Empathy Manifesto

    Samantha articulates the fundamental injustice that the Guardian must understand and address:
    1. Credit as a Gatekeeper: "Everyone understands the importance but majority don't meet 'the big' guys standards and then all of a sudden, no one cares to see them. Especially not the government."
    2. The System is Unforgiving: "The system is unforgiveable really. I've dreamt of a world where credit was trust based."
    3. The Paradox of Poverty: "You can be dead without dying" — You can be rich with no money, but the system doesn't recognize this.
    4. **The M

    The Integrated Strategic Compendium v4: A Unified Guide for the SIC Solve Team

    The Integrated Strategic Compendium v4: A Unified Guide for the SIC Solve Team

    Introduction: Evolving Our Strategic Lens

    This document represents the final, integrated strategic framework for the "When Execution Fails" project. It synthesizes the newly redesigned When Execution Fails v2 model with the Cashco 3.0 Integrated Diagnostic Framework and the Two Paths narrative, creating a single, comprehensive compendium for the SIC HB1000 Solve Team. This guide also codifies the Swiss International Style Presentation Protocol as our standard of excellence for all project deliverables.
    Our objective is to build a multi-dimensional understanding of execution failure. By layering the "who" (the organizational roles from Cashco) on top of the "what" (the five pillars of execution) and the "why" (the resulting failures), we equip ourselves with an unparalleled diagnostic and prescriptive tool to serve our Ruby Red client.

    The Three Pillars of Our Integrated Frame

    The Integrated Strategic Compendium: A Unified Guide for the SIC Solve Team

    The Integrated Strategic Compendium: A Unified Guide for the SIC Solve Team

    Introduction: Evolving Our Strategic Lens

    This document represents the next evolution of our strategic framework for the "When Execution Fails" project. It integrates the Cashco 3.0 Integrated Diagnostic Framework with our existing models—the "Anatomy of Execution Failure" and the "Two Paths" narrative—to create a single, comprehensive compendium for the SIC HB1000 Solve Team. Furthermore, this guide codifies the Swiss International Style Presentation Protocol, establishing a standard of excellence for all future project deliverables.
    Our objective is to build a multi-dimensional understanding of execution failure. By layering the "who" (the organizational roles from Cashco) on top of the "what" (the five layers of execution) and the "why" (the alignment or misalignment of purpose), we equip ourselves with an unparalleled diagnostic and prescriptive tool to serve our Ruby Red client.

    We are not asking MSTH to fund a lawsuit. We are not asking MSTH to carry legal liability. We are asking MSTH to accept a seat on the Steering Committee of a landmark Public Nuisance class action against the banks that facilitate the black market drug trade.

    Financial Wellness Gamification Protocol

    Financial Wellness Gamification Protocol

    Version: 1.0
    Date: January 31, 2026
    Author: SIC Solve Team / Manus AI
    Parent Standard: Universal Gamification Header Standard V3.0

    1. Overarching Principle: Safety, Hope, and Control

    This protocol provides specific guidance for applying the Universal Gamification Header Standard V3.0 to the sensitive domain of personal financial wellness for Ruby Red. The primary directive is to do no harm. Financial topics can induce significant anxiety, and traditional gamification tactics focused on competition or high-stakes rewards can be counterproductive and even dangerous. [1]
    Every implementation of this protocol must prioritize psychological safety, foster a sense of hope, and give Ruby Red a feeling of control over her financial life. The goal is not to make her feel like she is "losing a game," but to empower her with a clear, calm, and encouraging path forward.
    The North Star: Does this interact
    Starting Data Tracking Without a FormSaturday
    Cloud Butterflies Ecosystem Synthesis
    Gamification Progress Visualization Research Notes

    Gamification Progress Visualization Research Notes

    Source 1: BrightVibe - Ultimate Guide to Gamification (May 2024)

    Key Principles of Successful Gamification

    1. Define gamification goals: Each goal should be measurable (e.g., "increase daily active users by 20% within six months")
    2. Understand your audience: Different groups have different preferences - some seek competitive elements, others prefer reward systems based on task completion or badge collection
    3. Find the right balance: Balance playful elements with risk of being perceived as forced or annoying. Allow optional participation. Introduce game elements gradually.
    4. Test and iterate: Regular testing with real users, iterative improvement

    Common Mistakes to Avoid

    • Relying too heavily on external motivators (points, badges) - these become the only reason users interact
    • Not balancing fun with excessive gamification - can make users feel overwhelmed or annoyed
    • Key insight: Ef
    Universal Gamification Header Standard

    Universal Gamification Header Standard

    Version: 2.0
    Created: January 31, 2026
    Author: SIC Solve Team / Manus AI
    Purpose: Establish a universal standard for gamified progress visualization headers across all SIC initiatives

    Executive Summary

    This document establishes the Universal Gamification Header Standard for all SIC initiatives, processes, and applications. The standard mandates that the top 25% of every interface displays a gamified "You Are Here → Target" visualization that creates visual tension between current state and desired destination. This approach is grounded in extensive behavioral psychology research and proven real-world implementations from companies like Duolingo (47.7M DAU) and LinkedIn.
    The standard integrates six psychological principles into a cohesive visual framework that drives engagement, completion rates, and user satisfaction while maintaining alignment with the SIC mission of serving Ruby Red clients.

    Res

    Slander Infused Pre-Rolls Tasting Questionnaire

    Slander Infused Pre-Rolls Tasting Questionnaire

    Event: Private Tasting at Freedom
    Product: Slander Infused Pre-Rolls
    Budtender Information:
    Name:
    Dispensary:
    Email:
    Phone Number:
    Flavor Tasted: Canadian Kolada
    Instructions: Please answer the following questions based on your experience tasting the Slander Infused Pre-Rolls. Your feedback is valuable to us.
    1. What do you think of the flavor profile? What are your thoughts?
    2. How did you think it lit and burned at the beginning?
    3. What did you think of the flavor while smoking?
    4. What did you like or not like about the infused pre-rolls?
    5. Would you buy this infused pre-roll? If not, why not? What would you do differently?
    Additional Comments:
    Slander

    Gamified_Progress_Banner_Strategy.md

    Gamified Progress Banner Strategy Protocol

    Version: 1.0
    Created: January 29, 2026
    Author: SIC Solve Team / Manus AI
    Purpose: Transferable protocol for implementing engaging, gamified progress visualization in web applications

    Executive Summary

    The Gamified Progress Banner Strategy transforms traditional progress indicators into an emotionally engaging visual journey that occupies approximately 25% of the viewport. This approach leverages visual storytelling, color psychology, and spatial design to create a compelling narrative of transformation from current state to aspirational destination. The strategy has been successfully implemented in the Destiny Discovered application and is designed to be transferable across diverse project contexts.

    Core Philosophy

    The gamified banner operates on a fundamental psychological principle: humans are motivated by visual representations of progress toward meaningful goals. Rather than displaying abstr
    North Star Database - Quick Start Guide

    North Star Database - Quick Start Guide

    Getting Started in 5 Minutes

    Step 1: Verify Database Setup

    The database has already been initialized! Verify it's working:
    Bash
    cd /home/ubuntu/north_star_database
python3 scripts/query_database.py report
    You should see a summary report showing 1 sample respondent (Jessie Moores).

    Step 2: Add Your First Respondent

    Option A: Use the JSON Template

    1. Copy the template:
      Bash
      cp data/response_template.json data/my_respondent.json
    2. Edit data/my_respondent.json with your respondent's information
    3. Import it:
      Bash
      python3 scripts/add_respondent.py data/my_respondent.json

    Option B: Use the Web Form

    1. Start the web server:
      Bash
      python3 scripts/web_form.py
    2. Open your browser to: http://localhost:5000
    3. Fill out the form and submit

    Step 3: View Your Data

    List all respondents:
    Bash
    python3 scripts/query_database.py list
    View a specific responden

    LEARNING_LOOP_PROTOCOL_COMPLETE_WRITEUP.md

    THE LEARNING LOOP PROTOCOL

    Complete Write-Up for Cross-Conversation Deployment

    Version: 1.0
    Source: SOLVE Team Dual-Engine Protocol v1.0
    Date: January 29, 2026
    Purpose: Self-evaluation framework for AI outputs to ensure continuous quality improvement

    EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

    The Learning Loop Protocol is a simple but powerful self-evaluation framework that AI agents apply after every significant output to assess quality, identify gaps, and take corrective action before delivery.
    The Core Mechanism: After creating any major deliverable, the AI must answer four questions:
    1. SCORE: What's the quality score (1-100)?
    2. THE GAP: What's missing or could be better?
    3. THE FIX: What specific action would close the gap?
    4. ACTION: If score <80, implement the fix and re-run. If ≥80, deliver.
    The Result: Outputs consistently score 80+ before delivery, with most reaching 90-100. Quality control becomes automatic, not manual.

    LEARNING LOOP KPI CHECK

    LEARNING LOOP KPI CHECK

    Learning Loop Protocol Complete Write-Up

    Date: January 29, 2026
    Output: LEARNING_LOOP_PROTOCOL_COMPLETE_WRITEUP.md (65KB, ~11,000 words)

    ENGINE A: LEARNING LOOP PROTOCOL

    Assessment

    SCORE: 96/100
    THE GAP:
    1. Could include a one-page "cheat sheet" visual summary (for quick reference)
    2. Could add more examples of bad vs. good gap statements and fix statements
    3. Could include a "30-day implementation plan" for organizations adopting the protocol
    THE FIX: These are enhancements for future versions, not critical gaps:
    1. Create visual cheat sheet (infographic format) in next iteration
    2. Expand examples section with 10+ good/bad comparisons
    3. Add implementation roadmap for organizational rollout
    ACTION: Score is 96/100, well above the 80 threshold. Deliver with confidence. The document is comprehensive, clear, and immediately actionable. Enhancements listed above would make it even better but are not required for

    WISDOM GIANTS: COMPLETE PROJECT STATUS NARRATIVE

    Where We Are, What We've Built, and Where We're Going

    Date: January 29, 2026
    Status: Strategic Planning Complete → Ready for Q1 2026 Execution
    Author: Manus AI (SOLVE Team Member)
    For: HB1000, Chief Visionary Officer, SIC Solve Team

    EXECUTIVE SUMMARY: THE COMPLETE PICTURE

    Wisdom Giants is a social impact technology platform that combines artificial intelligence with human wisdom to answer life's hardest questions. It represents the convergence of three major movements: the democratization of wisdom (making expert guidance accessible to everyone), social impact capitalism (building profitable businesses that serve the underserved), and the SOLVE movement (fixing the three "gangsters" of capitalism, bureaucracy, and politics).
    We are at an inflection point. The strategic foundation is complete: the problem is clearly defined, the solution architecture is designed, the business model is validated, th
    Testing ElevenLabs API and Demo Script CreationWednesday
    ElevenLabs API Research Notes

    ElevenLabs API Research Notes

    Key Capabilities

    1. Text-to-Speech (TTS)

    • Convert text to high-quality, natural-sounding speech
    • Multiple models available:
      • Eleven Multilingual v2 (eleven_multilingual_v2): Best for stability, language diversity, accent accuracy; supports 29 languages
      • Eleven Flash v2.5 (eleven_flash_v2_5): Ultra-low latency, 32 languages, 50% lower price
      • Eleven Turbo v2.5 (eleven_turbo_v2_5): Good balance of quality and latency, 32 languages

    2. Voice Cloning

    • Clone voices from audio samples
    • Instant Voice Cloning (IVC) available via API
    • Requires audio samples (mp3 files)

    3. Streaming

    • Real-time audio streaming as it's being generated
    • Can play locally or process bytes manually

    4. Speech-to-Text

    • Transcribe audio to text
    • Word-level timestamps
    • Speaker diarization
    • Dynamic audio tagging

    5. Voice Changer

    • Transform voice characteristics

    6. Voice Isolator

    • Isolate voices from background noise

    voice_Sarah___Mature,_Reas.mp3
    compare_eleven_flash_v2_5.mp3

    Sunrise Cannabis Noble Cause Scoring System

    Sunrise Cannabis Noble Cause Scoring System

    Philosophy

    This scoring system is built on three foundational principles:
    1. Purpose Before Profit — The statement must lead with human dignity, healing, and moral weight, not commercial advantage.
    2. Purpose With Profit — The statement must be viable as a rallying cry that can also drive sustainable business.
    3. Putting a Ding in the Cannabis Universe — The statement must signal ambition to fundamentally change the industry by solving the many interconnected challenges across growers, retailers, regulators, and most importantly, the end user seeking relief.

    Scoring Categories (Total: 100 Points)

    Category
    Weight
    Description
    1. Moral Gravity
    25 pts
    Does the statement carry genuine moral weight? Does it speak to human dignity, rights, or justice? Does it feel noble—not just clever?
    2. Human-Centeredness
    20 pts
    Is the end user—the person see

    Dr. Sarah Chen: Photo-Realistic Graphics Strategy Consultation

    Dr. Sarah Chen: Photo-Realistic Graphics Strategy Consultation

    Date: January 27, 2026
    Project: Pawn Princess Solutions Website
    Focus: Photo-realistic graphics placement and storytelling strategy for Ruby Red client

    Executive Summary

    After reviewing the current site implementation, I'm providing a strategic framework for photo-realistic graphics that will build trust, reduce shame, and accelerate Ruby Red's decision to call Lauren. Every image must pass the "Mirror Test": Does Ruby Red see herself in this image? Does it make her feel less alone rather than more judged?

    Critical Insight: The Three Trust Barriers

    Ruby Red has three psychological barriers we must overcome with visuals:
    1. "Is this place safe for someone like me?" (Class/dignity anxiety)
    2. "Will they judge me?" (Shame barrier)
    3. "Is this a scam?" (Predatory lender PTSD)
    Every photo-realistic graphic must address at least one of these barriers.

    Priority

Let me transform this into a compelling, protocol-compliant presentation.

    Presentation Design Style Preference (Swiss Style)

    When creating a presentation, the user prefers the "Swiss style" design, replicating the aesthetic and layout of the last presentation delivered in that style. This preference should be applied to all future presentation design tasks, especially when producing a final report as part of a learning loop, unless otherwise specified.
